name: Dehydrated Jackfruit
description: Enjoy pure, sun-ripened jackfruit with a unique chewy-crisp bite and natural honey-like sweetness.
longDescription: Our dehydrated jackfruit is crafted from sun-ripened, hand-selected fruit using low-temperature dehydration. The result is a naturally sweet, chewy-crisp snack that retains the vibrant flavor and nutrients of fresh jackfruit — with no added sugar or preservatives.
usage: Enjoy straight from the pack as a healthy snack, or add to trail mixes, granola bowls, and desserts.
storage: Store in a cool, dry place. Keeps up to 12 months when sealed.

name: Heen Bovitiya Herbal Tea
description: Soothe your soul with floral notes and healing heritage for a peaceful evening.
longDescription: Heen Bovitiya (Osbeckia octandra) is a treasured Sri Lankan herb steeped in Ayurvedic tradition. Our herbal tea blend delivers delicate floral notes and a calming experience — ideal for unwinding after a long day.
usage: Steep one teaspoon in hot water for 5–7 minutes. Enjoy plain or with a touch of honey.
storage: Store in an airtight container away from direct sunlight.

name: Dehydrated Bitter Gourd
description: Crisp, airy chips preserving authentic earthy bitterness and pure holistic health.
longDescription: Bitter gourd (karavila) is celebrated in Sri Lankan cuisine for its wellness properties. Our dehydration process transforms it into light, crispy chips that preserve the authentic earthy character while making it easy to enjoy as a wholesome snack.
usage: Enjoy as crispy chips, or rehydrate with a little water for use in curries and stir-fries.
storage: Keep sealed in a cool, dry place for up to 12 months.

name: Dehydrated Kohila
description: Connect with traditional Sri Lankan roots through our fiber-rich, dehydrated Kohila, preserved for earthy flavor and natural texture.
longDescription: Kohila (Lasia spinosa) is a traditional Sri Lankan aquatic plant valued for its fiber content and distinctive earthy flavor. Dehydrated at low temperatures to lock in nutrients, our Kohila brings authentic island heritage to your kitchen.
usage: Rehydrate for 45–60 minutes, then prepare as mallum, curry, or stir-fry — just like fresh Kohila.
storage: Store in a cool, dry place. Reseal after opening.

name: Heen Bovitiya Powder
description: Pure herbal support that mixes easily into daily drinks for a boost of natural wellness.
longDescription: Finely milled from premium Heen Bovitiya leaves, this powder dissolves easily into smoothies, herbal drinks, and warm water. A convenient daily wellness boost rooted in Sri Lankan herbal tradition.
usage: Add half a teaspoon to warm water, smoothies, or porridge. Stir well and enjoy.
storage: Keep in a sealed container in a cool, dry place.

name: Dehydrated Banana with Sesame Seeds
description: Indulge in a perfect, naturally sweet crunch. Our sesame-encrusted dehydrated banana pieces offer a guilt-free and delightful snack fusion.
longDescription: Ripe Sri Lankan bananas meet toasted sesame seeds in this unique snack fusion. Low-temperature dehydration preserves natural sweetness while the sesame adds a satisfying crunch and nutty depth.
usage: Perfect as a standalone snack, lunchbox treat, or topping for yogurt and oatmeal.
storage: Store sealed in a cool, dry place for up to 12 months.
